```{r}
    #scale_color_manual(values=brewer.pal(8, "Set1")[c(2,5,1)]) +
    scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    scale_y_continuous(trans = "log2") +
    facet_wrap(~PathwayName, scales="free_y", ncol=3) +
    labs(x="", color="Growth failure",
         y="Relative abundance",
         title = "Pathways in samples that had gene abundance differences")
  
  ggsave(here("Output",glue("{current_sub_study}_kegg_pathway_differences_growth_failure_{i}.pdf")), height=7, width=12, useDingbats=F)
}

```

### KEGG orthologs

Taking the top 500 KEGG orthologs and testing them

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=TRUE, results='asis'}

top500 <- kegg_props %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% s_toTest$SampleID) %>%
  group_by(geneID) %>%
  summarise(mean_props = mean(props)) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_props)) %>%
  slice(1:500)

kegg_props_subset <- kegg_props %>%
  select(SampleID, Ortholog = geneID, count, props) %>%
  filter(Ortholog %in% top500$geneID) %>%
  mutate(props_log2 = log2(props))

form1 = "props_log2 ~ timepoint_numeric * growth_failure + npo_days_prop + feeds_prop_hm + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

#for whatever reason, I'm getting a "Error in MEEM(object, conLin, control$niterEM) : Overfitted model!" error code in nlme

# temp_df <- tibble()
# 
# for (kegg_gene in top500$geneID) {
# 
#   props_toTest <- kegg_props %>%
#   filter(geneID %in% kegg_gene) %>%
#   mutate(props_log2 = log2(props)) %>%
#   inner_join(s_toTest, by = "SampleID")
# 
#   possible_error <- try(tiny_df <- tidy_lmer(nlme::lme(as.formula(form1), random = as.formula("~ 1 | SubjectID"), data=props_toTest, na.action=na.omit)) %>% filter(term != '(Intercept)'))
# 
#   tiny_df$geneID <- kegg_gene
# 
#   if (class(possible_error)[1] %in% "try-error") {
#     tiny_df <- tibble()
#   }
# 
#   temp_df <- bind_rows(temp_df, tiny_df)
# 
# }
# 
# summaries_df <- temp_df %>%
#   group_by(term) %>%
#   mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
#   ungroup() %>%
#   select(Ortholog = geneID, everything())
# 
# save(summaries_df, file = here("Data", glue("{current_sub_study}_kegg500_changes_gf.RDS")))

load(file = here("Data", glue("{current_sub_study}_kegg500_changes_gf.RDS")))

to_select <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), fdr < 0.05, Value > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(Value)) %>%
  slice(1:45) %>%
  pull(Ortholog) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()
  
plot_df <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), Ortholog %in% to_select) %>%
  left_join(kegg_defnitions, by = "Ortholog") %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = paste(Ortholog, str_trunc(Definition, 30, "right"))) %>%
  mutate(CI95_lwr = round(Value - 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(CI95_upr = round(Value + 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(Significant = case_when(fdr < 0.05 ~ "p.adj < 0.05",
                                 fdr > 0.05 ~ "Not significant")) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = fct_reorder(ortho_lable, Value))

g <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(Value, ortho_lable, color = term, shape = Significant)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=Value-Std.Error, xmax=Value+Std.Error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.4)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Not significant" = 1, "p.adj < 0.05" = 19)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_fail[2]) +
  labs(y = "Ortholog / Description",
       x = "<-- Decreased vs. no growth failure    Increased vs. no growth failure -->")

plot(g)

ggsave(here("Output", glue("{current_sub_study}_top_increasing_orthologs_gf.pdf")), height = 7, width = 10)

to_select <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), fdr < 0.05, Value < 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(Value)) %>%
  slice(1:45) %>%
  pull(Ortholog) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()
  
plot_df <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), Ortholog %in% to_select) %>%
  left_join(kegg_defnitions, by = "Ortholog") %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = paste(Ortholog, str_trunc(Definition, 30, "right"))) %>%
  mutate(CI95_lwr = round(Value - 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(CI95_upr = round(Value + 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(Significant = case_when(fdr < 0.05 ~ "p.adj < 0.05",
                                 fdr > 0.05 ~ "Not significant")) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = fct_reorder(ortho_lable, Value))

g <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(Value, ortho_lable, color = term, shape = Significant)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=Value-Std.Error, xmax=Value+Std.Error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.4)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Not significant" = 1, "p.adj < 0.05" = 19)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_fail[2]) +
  labs(y = "Ortholog / Description",
       x = "<-- Decreased vs. no growth failure    Increased vs. no growth failure -->")

plot(g)

ggsave(here("Output", glue("{current_sub_study}_top_decreasing_orthologs_gf.pdf")), height = 7, width = 10)

table_name <- glue("{current_sub_study}_individual_gene_changes_growth_categories_gf.csv")

my_table <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), fdr < 0.05) %>%
  left_join(kegg_defnitions, by = "Ortholog") %>%
  left_join(path_annotation, by = "Ortholog")

write_csv(my_table, here("Output", table_name))

print(glue("All orthologs saved together as {table_name}"))

```

#### Combined graph

```{r}

to_select <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), fdr < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(desc(fdr)) %>%
  slice(1:45) %>%
  pull(Ortholog) %>%
  as.character() %>%
  unique()
  
plot_df <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes"), Ortholog %in% to_select) %>%
  left_join(kegg_defnitions, by = "Ortholog") %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = paste(Ortholog, str_trunc(Definition, 30, "right"))) %>%
  mutate(CI95_lwr = round(Value - 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(CI95_upr = round(Value + 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(Significant = case_when(fdr < 0.05 ~ "p.adj < 0.05",
                                 fdr > 0.05 ~ "Not significant")) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  mutate(ortho_lable = fct_reorder(ortho_lable, Value))

g <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(Value, ortho_lable, color = term, shape = Significant)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=Value-Std.Error, xmax=Value+Std.Error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.4)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Not significant" = 1, "p.adj < 0.05" = 19)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = ann_colors$growth_fail[2]) +
  labs(y = "Ortholog / Description",
       x = "<-- Decreased vs. no growth failure    Increased vs. no growth failure -->",
       color = "")

plot(g)

ggsave(here("Output", glue("{current_sub_study}_top_changing_orthologs_gf.pdf")), height = 5.5, width = 10.5)

```


### Butyrate and Aromatic amino acids

#### Linear models

```{r, results='asis'}

props_toTest <- but_ipa %>%
  mutate(props_log2 = log2(props))

form1 = "props_log2 ~ timepoint_numeric * growth_failure + npo_days_prop + feeds_prop_hm + AbxHoursPerHOL"
random1 = "SubjectID"

#for whatever reason, I'm getting a "false convergence (8)" error code in nlminb

temp_df <- tibble()

for (selected_gene in unique(but_ipa$geneID)) {

  props_toTest <- but_ipa %>%
  filter(geneID %in% selected_gene) %>%
  mutate(props_log2 = log2(props)) %>%
  inner_join(s_toTest, by = "SampleID")

  possible_error <- try(tiny_df <- tidy_lmer(nlme::lme(as.formula(form1), random = as.formula("~ 1 | SubjectID"), data=props_toTest, na.action=na.omit)) %>% filter(term != '(Intercept)'))

  tiny_df$geneID <- selected_gene

  if (class(possible_error)[1] %in% "try-error") {
    print(glue("Error with {selected_gene}"))
    tiny_df <- tibble()
  }

  temp_df <- bind_rows(temp_df, tiny_df)

}

summaries_df <- temp_df %>%
  group_by(term) %>%
  mutate(fdr = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(geneID, everything())

summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(p.value < 0.05) %>%
  pander(split.table=Inf, digits=2, caption = glue("Linear models of log2 transformed abundances"), emphasize.strong.rows = which(.$fdr<=0.05))

table_export(summaries_df %>% filter(p.value < 0.05), "gene_analysis_table_")

```

#### Graphing these changes

```{r}

plot_df <- summaries_df %>%
  mutate(term = str_remove(term, "growth_failure")) %>%
  filter(term %in% c("Yes")) %>%
  left_join(annot_df, by = "geneID") %>%
  mutate(CI95_lwr = round(Value - 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(CI95_upr = round(Value + 1.96*Std.Error, 2)) %>%
  mutate(Significant = case_when(fdr < 0.05 ~ "p.adj < 0.05",
                                 fdr > 0.05 ~ "Not significant")) %>%
  arrange(Value) %>%
  mutate(geneID = fct_reorder(geneID, Value))

g <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(Value, geneID, color = term, shape = Significant)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=Value-Std.Error, xmax=Value+Std.Error), position = position_dodge(width = 0.4)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "longdash") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(1,19)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=ann_colors$growth_fail[2]) +
  facet_grid(database~"Value", scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
  labs(y = "geneID",
       x = "<-- Decreased vs. no growth failure    Increased vs. no growth failure -->",
       color = "Growth failure")

plot(g)

ggsave(here("Output",glue("{current_sub_study}_gene_abundaces_but_ipa_gf.pdf")), height=5, width=8, useDingbats=F)

```

```{r savepoint, include=FALSE}

save.image(file = here("Data", "after_gene_abundance_analysis.RData"))

```

# End of Report

```{r Generate time stamped report2, eval=FALSE, include=FALSE}

#neat: you can run this following command in the console to give your reports custom names (or date-stamp them)

rstudioapi::documentSaveAll()

script_dir <- file.path("Scripts","Rmds")
output_dir <- file.path("Output")

if (!dir.exists(here::here(output_dir))) {
  dir.create(here::here(output_dir))
}

report_fp <- here::here(script_dir, "Shotgun_gene_abundance_analysis.Rmd")
output_fp <- here::here(output_dir, paste('Shotgun_gene_abundance_analysis_', Sys.Date(), '.pdf', sep=''))

rmarkdown::render(report_fp, output_file = output_fp)

```
